Document:
# Server Rules Welcome to Boomer Station! As we are under the Monke Station 13 umbrella, your ban may be mirrored to our other servers!
[color=#ff0000]Boomer Station is an 18+ MRP server. That said, ERP is prohibited. Please read our rules carefully before playing on our server.[/color]
## Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds. While we intend these rules to be quick to read and comprehensive, keep in mind we cannot fit everything in them.
- [textlink="0. Admins have final say" link="RuleC1"] - [textlink="1. Don't be a jerk, a bigot, or inappropriate." link="RuleC2"] - [textlink="2. Stay in-character and do your job" link="RuleC3"] - [textlink="3. You must play fairly" link="RuleC4"] - [textlink="4. Lowpop Clause" link="RuleC5"] - [textlink="5. No VPNs" link="RuleC6"] - [textlink="6. Blackout Policy" link="RuleC7"] - [textlink="7. Memory Loss" link="RuleC8"] - [textlink="8. The Maintenance Clause" link="RuleC9"] - [textlink="9. Deep Space Clause" link="RuleC10"]
